personal_profile.headline: Senior Frontend Engineer
personal_profile.summary: Frontend engineer with strong React/TypeScript experience and modern JavaScript skills.

bullets.text: Led migration of legacy codebase to React 18 with TypeScript, improving load times by 40%.
Architected a component library used across 12 teams, enforcing consistency in UI patterns.
Implemented Jest and React Testing Library, achieving 85% code coverage for critical paths.
Built responsive React applications for 20+ client projects using modern component patterns.
Optimized bundle sizes and implemented lazy loading, reducing initial load time by 50%.
Maintained jQuery-based admin panels and updated legacy HTML pages.

projects.name: E-commerce Redesign
projects.summary: Complete redesign of client e-commerce platform with modern React stack.

bullets.text: Redesigned checkout flow with React and Stripe integration, increasing conversion by 15%.
Implemented code splitting and image optimization, achieving 95+ Lighthouse score.

projects.name: Legacy Site Update
projects.summary: Minor updates to old corporate website.

bullets.text: Updated static pages with new content and fixed minor CSS issues.
